title: Ancient Legends
description: A Huge Fantasy mod with biomes, armor sets, weapons and monsters.
body:
![Brand new biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/668dad7de7eddc1e1f77389dc9eb75c6c0c57f3a.png)![Unique equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/242796a72d5909daa6cb29e563a8dd1dcf7fccc7.png)![New pets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0281b4fc32d783f444849a451d60c2a13491ae3.png)![Nightmare mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a66dfa9165511aaa58e1aae08db97e12f30c7a0.png)

The Ancient Legends mod aims to add a Fantasy experience to Minecraft.It adds : 

8 armor sets with unique and interesting powers,

26 new tools and weapons

 23 new mobs including :

-3 tameable ones

-2 powerful bosses : The wither wizard and the ancient behemoth,

-2 minibosses : the ice behemoth and the dead knight, 

8 biomes and 20 new structures to add a new purpose to exploration,

2 new ores : the silver ore and the Divinum ore : a higher tier than netherite

New building blocks

New food sources

[ ℹ️ ] Mod wiki : https://ancient-legends-mod.fandom.com
